name: integration_enterprise_customers_are_slow_and_painfu
method:
Enterprise customers are slow and painful to land… but the LTV makes it worth it Founder here. Quick story time.

Back in June 2024 we started talking with a large Fortune 300 company. Getting a seat

phases.name: extract_method
steps: extract timing benchmarks: 11mo cycle, 3mo trial, Fortune 300 tier

phases.name: content_generation
steps: generate 3 tweets: enterprise LTV math, patience as competitive moat, why most indie hackers quit too early
generate 1 thread: enterprise vs SMB unit economics breakdown

phases.name: strategic_filing
steps: append enterprise sales playbook notes to EAS venture knowledge base
update OUTBOUND venture with enterprise tier qualification criteria: only pursue when MRR > $5K
